deviations.description: The process model requires blood samples to be collected from all patients, including non-adults, while Version 2 only obligates collection from adult patients. This results in unnecessary collection from non-adult patients, exceeding the new requirement.

The compliance pattern in the process model enforces blood sample collection for every patient resource, but Version 2 restricts the obligation to cases where patient.age is 'adult'. The process model does not implement this data-based restriction, leading to over-compliance.
process_model_reference: collect blood sample (for all patient resources, without age check)
